'''''Star Wars: Republic: Siege of Saleucami''''' was the eighteenth story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]. Written by [[John Ostrander]] and drawn by [[Jan Duursema]], the story consisted of issues 74-77.
